summary: Implemented the Go MCP server adapter with lazy initialization, DB freshness detection via JSON file fingerprinting, and automatic rebuild orchestration. Supports dual transport: streamable HTTP (default) and stdio. The EnsureFresh method compares stored fingerprints against computed ones from JSON memory files, triggering a full DB rebuild from JSON when stale. RegisterTools function wires 5 MCP tools (search_file_memory_by_path, search_project_memory_by_topic, recall_memory, project_memory_overview, memory_inspect) with proper MCP annotations.
